title: Christmas Stocking,Large Santa Stocking,14" Personalised Xmas Stockings for Kid Adults. (Red, Santa Claus)
features: 🎅【Best Christmas Ornaments 】:Every Christmas, children look forward to the arrival of Santa Claus most. I believe that Santa Claus will slide down the chimney and put gifts in Christmas stocking. So please hang the XTAIQD christmas stockings for adults set by the fireplace or the bed. This is the children's favorite Christmas decoration and an essential Christmas decoration!

🎅【Exceptional Artisan Quality】: Extremely detailed & vibrantly embroidered designed Santa, Snowman. Meticulous sewing and thorough check to make every stocking are as pictures show. Durable & reusable for many years.

🎅【Large Stockings】 – There is plenty of storage space in the big 14-inch Christmas stocking. Your anticipation for Christmas will undoubtedly rise after receiving this stocking. It can be combined with other Christmas decorations so that you and your family can celebrate Christmas together, thus it is one of the best ones!

🎅【Perfect For the Festive Season】 – Beautiful Christmas stockings are a necessity for Christmas; they have a charming appearance and may be filled with treats like candy or chocolates, party favors, miniature toys, and many other things.

🎅【Great Giveaways】: Charity events, fundraisers, shelters soup kitchens, can be filled with goodies, and they are perfect for family parties, schools, classrooms, clubs, offices, employees, restaurant staff & other big groups.
